name: Engine Start
description: Heavy industrial engine turning over and catching

prompts.label: heavy industrial engine turning over and catching with roar
prompts.text: heavy industrial engine turning over and catching with roar, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay

prompts.label: diesel motor cranking with building combustion rhythm
prompts.text: diesel motor cranking with building combustion rhythm, Victorian clocktower, ratchet wrench click, oiled-machine rhythm, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, impactful, smooth fade out

prompts.label: factory main engine firing up with increasing RPM
prompts.text: factory main engine firing up with increasing RPM, locomotive engine room, tempered steel spring release, riveted iron solidity, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, sustained resonance

prompts.label: steam locomotive boiler pressure building to operating level
prompts.text: steam locomotive boiler pressure building to operating level, blacksmith anvil yard, cast iron lever thrown, pneumatic power hiss, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, impactful, with natural decay

prompts.label: vintage motor sputtering then catching with confident rumble
prompts.text: vintage motor sputtering then catching with confident rumble, submarine pressure hull, copper pipe resonance ping, precision clockwork ticking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, smooth fade out
